title: aspidium lanosum
intro: Aspidium lanosum, also known as the woolly fern or woolly spleenwort, is a species of fern native to Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, such as skin conditions, respiratory problems, and menstrual irregularities, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Aspidium lanosum can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for oral consumption, or applied topically as a poultice or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
